02.label: Belief Pattern
02.text: I always start strong and fade out.

03.label: Belief Pattern
03.text: I need to fix myself before I can succeed.

04.label: Belief Pattern
04.text: If it feels hard, I must be doing something wrong.

05.label: Belief Pattern
05.text: Others are more disciplined than me.

06.label: Belief Pattern
06.text: I don’t trust myself to follow through.

07.label: Belief Pattern
07.text: I overthink everything and delay action.

08.label: Belief Pattern
08.text: I’m already behind, so what’s the point?

09.label: Belief Pattern
09.text: I can’t change this part of me.

10.label: Belief Pattern
10.text: If I slow down, I’ll fall behind.

11.label: Belief Pattern
11.text: I need motivation to take action.

12.label: Belief Pattern
12.text: I’ve failed too many times before.

13.label: Belief Pattern
13.text: I don’t have enough energy to stay consistent.

14.label: Belief Pattern
14.text: If I rest, I’m being lazy.

16.label: Belief Pattern
16.text: I should be further ahead by now.

19.label: Belief Pattern
19.text: I need clarity before I start.

21.label: Belief Pattern
21.text: I can’t stay focused for long.

23.label: Belief Pattern
23.text: I’m too sensitive for this world.

25.label: Belief Pattern
25.text: If I fail again, it will prove something is wrong with me.

27.label: Recode Statement
27.text: Consistency is built through systems, not personality.

28.label: Recode Statement
28.text: Small actions done repeatedly create stability.

29.label: Recode Statement
29.text: I don’t need fixing — I need support and structure.

30.label: Recode Statement
30.text: Difficulty is part of rewiring, not a warning sign.

32.label: Recode Statement
32.text: Self-trust grows through kept promises — even small ones.

33.label: Recode Statement
33.text: Action clarifies thinking, not the other way around.

34.label: Recode Statement
34.text: Starting now always beats waiting longer.

35.label: Recode Statement
35.text: My brain is adaptable and trainable.

36.label: Recode Statement
36.text: Rest is a strategy for sustainability.

37.label: Recode Statement
37.text: Motivation follows action — not precedes it.

38.label: Recode Statement
38.text: Past attempts gave me data, not failure.

39.label: Recode Statement
39.text: Energy grows when actions are aligned and gentle.

40.label: Recode Statement
40.text: Rest allows my nervous system to recover and perform.

41.label: Recode Statement
41.text: Habits are skills — and skills can be learned.

42.label: Recode Statement
42.text: My timeline does not define my potential.

43.label: Recode Statement
43.text: I can make decisions and adjust as I go.

45.label: Recode Statement
45.text: I can begin before feeling ready.

46.label: Recode Statement
46.text: Small actions compound into real change.

47.label: Recode Statement
47.text: Focus improves with practice, not pressure.

49.label: Recode Statement
49.text: Sensitivity is a strength when regulated.

50.label: Recode Statement
50.text: I am learning how to rely on myself safely.

52.label: Recode Statement
52.text: Change happens through repetition, not force.
